ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "fullname" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the contact */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the contact */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) of the contact */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the contact was added to the system */,
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact type */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact role */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the contact */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the contact */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company of the contact */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the contact record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the contact record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_contact_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_type_id") REFERENCES contact_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES contact_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact role is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact associated with the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the address is the primary address for the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_addresses_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_phones" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact associated with the phone number */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone number (e.g., mobile, home, work) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the phone number is the primary phone number for the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_phones_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction category */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the interaction record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_interactions_interaction_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_category_id") REFERENCES interaction_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_interactions_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's account was locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contact */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference setting */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact associated with the preferences */,
  "communication_pref" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact has opted into marketing communications */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings for the contact */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the preference record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the preference record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_preferences_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)
